title: lithospermum fruticosum f. consobrinum
intro: Lithospermum fruticosum f. consobrinum, also known as Consobrinum, is a subspecies of the Lithospermum fruticosum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Consobrinum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Consobrinum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
